remarks: EAST NORWALK RENTAL!!! ONE BEDROOM UNIT LOCATED ON THE SECOND FLOOR WITHIN WALKING DISTANCE TO METRO NORTH, LOCAL NEIGHBORHOOD RESTAURANTS, VETERANS PARK, CALF PASTURE BEACH, LAUNDOMAT, SONO COLLECTIONS MALL AND ALL SOUTH NORWALK (SONO) HAS TO OFFER. OFF-STREET PARKING FOR ONE CAR, WITH ADDITONAL ON-STREET PARKING AVAILABLE. LANDLORD REQUIRES GOOD CREDIT, PROOF OF HOUSEHOLD INCOME AND REFERENCES. NO PETS/NO SMOKING.
